trigger: 三年后在江南寻得女主，面对女主的新生活与新夫婿彻底破防，深夜爬床打地铺，抛弃所有尊严死缠烂打。

appearance_delta.face: 阴沉且病态，表情似哭似笑，眼神中透着绝望的贪婪
appearance_delta.body: 姿态卑微到尘埃里，如同摇尾乞怜的丧家之犬，紧紧贴附着女主
appearance_delta.hair: 未戴发冠，长发披散，显得落魄且疯狂
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 抛弃所有高傲，眼神中只剩下病态的占有欲和恬不知耻的执拗

costume_override.outfit: 单薄凌乱的内衫/单衣（深夜打地铺时），或沾染江南风雪的黯淡披风

visual_reference: A handsome young ancient Chinese man in a humble and obsessive state, pale skin, crazy and greedy amber eyes, long messy loose hair, a bitter smile mixed with tears, wearing simple and slightly messy white inner robes, lying low on the floor hugging a quilt, obsessive and pathetic demeanor, dimly lit room with moonlight, 8k.
emotional_tone: 偏执、疯狂、卑微、病态的占有欲
